payload.message:
Run workflow: build-list

Cron mode: run exactly one short batch only. Use TARGET_COUNT=100 for Apollo, then run one Bouncer pass, then stop. Do not loop inside this agent turn. Report the current daily bouncer_verified count to Slack channel C0A5S86QH9D. If any error occurs, report it to Slack channel C0ALRRHK61X.

state.lastError: FailoverError: No API key found for provider "openai". Auth store: /home/os/openclaw-mvp/state/agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json (agentDir: /home/os/openclaw-mvp/state/agents/main/agent). Configure auth for this agent (openclaw agents add <id>) or copy auth-profiles.json from the main agentDir.

payload.message:
Run workflow: load-campaign

Cron mode: keep this run short. Load at most 100 verified leads this turn (LOAD_LIMIT=100), then stop and report summary to Slack channel C0A5S86QH9D. If any error occurs, report it to Slack channel C0ALRRHK61X.

payload.message:
Run workflow: process-replies

Fetch replies from Instantly inbox for today. Classify hot/soft/objection/negative. Send automated reply to hot leads. After completing, report step summary (# replies fetched, # hot, # replied) to Slack channel C0A5S86QH9D. If any error occurs, report it to Slack channel C0ALRRHK61X.

Run workflow: daily-report

Send the daily report to Slack channel C0A5S86QH9D. If any error occurs, report it to Slack channel C0ALRRHK61X.
